coin_toss_outcome.description: Possible outcome of each fair coin toss (Head or Tail), with P(H) = P(T) = 0.5.

number_of_tosses.description: Total number of successive coin tosses.

condition_first_toss.description: The given condition that the first toss resulted in a head.

threshold_heads.description: The minimum number of heads (at least two) required for the event of interest.
